page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Perception of Chemical Bonds via Machine Learning.

A tool for the perception of chemical bonds via machine learning.

A python tool for the perception of chemical bonds via machine learning.

Internally uses RDKit, numpy, pandas and scikit-learn python packages.
